creator: m.ne@gmx.net
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #1)
There is a change log, actually, but that has no entries beyond 20.04p14. (See https://fractint.net/ftp/current/dos/whatsnew.txt) That's the reason I chose not to add it, as it might be more confusing than helpful. But I won't mind being overruled on that matter.
